name: ZDI Container External Table and View

content.query:
--DROP VIEW ZDI.Container
CREATE VIEW ZDI.Container AS 
SELECT *, TRY_CONVERT(date, REPLACE(SUBSTRING([Filename], CHARINDEX('Report__', [Filename]) + 19, 10),'_', '/')) Filedate
FROM ZDI.ContainerRaw
WHERE TRY_CONVERT(date, REPLACE(SUBSTRING([Filename], CHARINDEX('Report__', [Filename]) + 19, 10),'_', '/')) IN (
	SELECT
    MAX(TRY_CONVERT(date, REPLACE(SUBSTRING([Filename], CHARINDEX('Report__', [Filename]) + 19, 10),'_', '/'))) FileDate
    FROM ZDI.ContainerRaw
)

SELECT TOP 100 *
FROM ZDI.Container

-- DROP EXTERNAL TABLE ZDI.ContainerAuto
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE ZDI.ContainerRaw (
	[Container Number(s)] nvarchar(4000),
	[Po Number] nvarchar(4000),
	[Invoice Number] nvarchar(4000),
	[Invoice date] nvarchar(4000),
	[Ship Date] nvarchar(4000),
	[Carrier Name] nvarchar(4000),
	[Payable Amount] float,
	[Linehaul] float,
	[Final Mile] float,
	[Other] float,
	[Payment Number] nvarchar(4000),
	[Batch Date] nvarchar(4000),
	[Status] nvarchar(4000),
	[Division] nvarchar(4000),
	[BOL Number] nvarchar(4000),
	[In Gate Date] nvarchar(4000),
	[Shipper Name] nvarchar(4000),
	[Shipper Address] nvarchar(4000),
	[Shipper City] nvarchar(4000),
	[Shipper State] nvarchar(4000),
	[Shipper Country] nvarchar(4000),
	[Shipper ZIP] nvarchar(4000),
	[Consignee Name] nvarchar(4000),
	[Filename] AS filename()
	)
	WITH (
	LOCATION = 'ZeroDown/Freight_-_Legacy_Container_Invoice_Report*.csv',
	DATA_SOURCE = [tlclakefs_tlclake_dfs_core_windows_net],
	FILE_FORMAT = [SynapseDelimitedTextFormatQuote]
	)
GO
